meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve tutorial hell (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Break out of tutorial hell by building real user onboarding flows. Use this expert checklist featuring Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your first app.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop watching and start architecting. By building a functional user onboarding flow, you bridge the gap between theory and product. This checklist uses Antigravity to structure your database and Claude Code to implement the logic, turning your code into a real-world, user-facing experience.
content.intro:
You’ve watched the videos, followed the syntax, and finished the 'To-Do' list app. Yet, when you stare at a blank IDE, the cursor blinks back at you with mocking indifference. You are trapped in the high-definition purgatory of tutorial hell, where you know how to write code but have no idea how to build a product.

The secret to breaking free isn't another course—it's friction. By engineering a professional user onboarding flow, you force yourself to handle authentication, state management, and user psychology. We are moving from 'following along' to 'shipping value'. Let's build.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Map out exactly what happens from the moment a user signs up to their 'Aha!' moment. Keep it under three screens.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Senior Product Engineer. Define a 3-step user onboarding schema for a SaaS app, focusing on high conversion, including database fields for user preferences and progress tracking.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a user-journey.md file outlining the onboarding flow logic based on the schema provided.'

steps.title: Initialize the Auth Scaffold
steps.description: Set up authentication to protect your routes. This is the foundation of any real-world application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure authentication boilerplate using Next.js and Supabase, ensuring users are redirected to the onboarding flow upon first login.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Install auth dependencies and create the protected middleware for the /onboarding route.'

steps.title: Build the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Use a state machine to track where the user is in the onboarding process so they can resume if they refresh.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React hook 'useOnboarding' that manages step-by-step state and persists progress to the database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the useOnboarding hook and integrate it with the onboarding component.'

steps.title: Implement Interactive UI Components
steps.description: Build the actual forms and progress bars. Focus on micro-interactions that make the app feel alive.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Tailwind CSS components for a multi-step onboarding wizard, including a progress bar and smooth transition animations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create the OnboardingWizard component with motion transitions and form validation.'

steps.title: Finalize and Deploy
steps.description: Wrap up the logic and push to production to see your work live.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for security vulnerabilities in the onboarding flow and suggest optimizations for faster load times.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Run test suite, fix linting errors, and prepare for Vercel deployment.'

pro_tips: Always store onboarding progress in the database, not local storage, so users can switch devices.
Use 'optimistic UI' updates to make your app feel instantaneous, even if the backend is still processing.
Add a 'Skip' button to your onboarding; forcing a user through a 10-step flow is the fastest way to lose them.
Focus on one 'Aha!' moment per onboarding flow; don't try to teach them every feature at once.
Treat your onboarding code as a separate module to make it reusable for future projects.
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, start adding a 'Feedback' loop where users can rate their onboarding experience. This data will be your first real insight into product-market fit.
content.conversion_block: You now have the blueprint to stop being a student and start being a founder. Stop watching tutorials and start shipping. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
